translations.en: We want to do something today.
translations.fr: On veut faire quelque chose aujourd'hui.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bọn mình muốn làm gì đó.
translations.hi: हम आज कुछ करना चाहते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi vil finne på noe i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kita ingin melakukan sesuatu.
translations.sv: Vi vill hitta på något i dag.
translations.da: Vi vil finde på noget i dag.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative subject pronoun.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st pl) selecting the bare infinitive 'unternehmen'; expresses intention.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the (unspecified) direct object of 'unternehmen'.
Bare infinitive main verb, selected by the modal 'wollen'; inseparable-prefix verb.

sentences.target: Ich habe Lust, mal was zu unternehmen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə lʊst maːl vas tsuː ʊntɐˈneːmən/

translations.de: Ich habe Lust, mal was zu unternehmen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə lʊst maːl vas tsuː ʊntɐˈneːmən/
translations.fr: J'ai envie de faire quelque chose.
translations.pt: Estou com vontade de fazer alguma coisa.
translations.nl: Ik heb zin om iets te doen.
translations.hi: मेरा कुछ करने का मन है.
translations.nb: Jeg har lyst til å finne på noe.
translations.sv: Jag är sugen på att hitta på något.
translations.da: Jeg har lyst til at finde på noget.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg) in the light-verb construction 'Lust haben' meaning 'to feel like'.
Noun object of 'haben' in the idiom 'Lust haben' indicating desire.
Modal particle softening the request/statement; pragmatic, not contributing propositional content.
Colloquial indefinite pronoun (for 'etwas'); direct object of 'unternehmen'.
Infinitival marker introducing the non-finite verb 'unternehmen' in the complement clause.
Infinitive verb heading the 'zu'-infinitive clause that complements 'Lust haben'; inseparable-prefix verb.

sentences.target: Am Wochenende können wir was unternehmen.

translations.de: Am Wochenende können wir was unternehmen.
translations.en: We can do something on the weekend.
translations.es: El fin de semana podemos hacer algo.
translations.fr: On peut faire quelque chose ce week-end.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana possiamo fare qualcosa.
translations.yue: 週末我哋可以出去玩下。
translations.ru: На выходных мы можем чем-нибудь заняться.
translations.pt: No fim de semana podemos fazer alguma coisa.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần mình có thể làm gì đó.
translations.ar: في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع يمكننا أن نفعل شيئًا.
translations.nl: In het weekend kunnen we iets doen.
translations.uk: На вихідних ми можемо щось зробити.
translations.hi: वीकेंड पर हम कुछ कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Το Σαββατοκύριακο μπορούμε να κάνουμε κάτι.
translations.nb: I helgen kan vi finne på noe.
translations.id: Akhir pekan kita bisa melakukan sesuatu.
translations.sv: I helgen kan vi hitta på något.
translations.ro: În weekend putem să facem ceva.
translations.da: I weekenden kan vi finde på noget.

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contraction of 'an dem') introducing a temporal PP; governs dative.
Head noun of the temporal PP; dative case as governed by 'an'.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st pl) in V2 position; selects the bare infinitive 'unternehmen'; expresses ability/possibility.
1st-person plural nominative subject pronoun.
Colloquial indefinite pronoun (for 'etwas'); direct object of 'unternehmen'.
Bare infinitive main verb selected by 'können'; inseparable-prefix verb.

sentences.target: Die Kinder möchten nach der Schule etwas unternehmen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈmœçtən naːx deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə ˈɛtvas ʊntɐˈneːmən/

translations.de: Die Kinder möchten nach der Schule etwas unternehmen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈmœçtən naːx deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə ˈɛtvas ʊntɐˈneːmən/
translations.en: The kids would like to do something after school.
translations.es: Los niños quieren hacer algo después de la escuela.
translations.fr: Les enfants aimeraient faire quelque chose après l'école.
translations.it: I bambini vorrebbero fare qualcosa dopo la scuola.
translations.ko: 아이들이 방과 후에 뭐라도 하고 싶어 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们放学后想出去玩。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友放學後想出去玩下。
translations.ru: Дети хотят чем-нибудь заняться после школы.
translations.pt: As crianças gostariam de fazer alguma coisa depois da escola.
translations.he: הילדים רוצים לעשות משהו אחרי הלימודים.
translations.tr: Çocuklar okuldan sonra bir şeyler yapmak istiyor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ muốn làm gì đó sau giờ học.
translations.ar: الأطفال يريدون أن يفعلوا شيئًا بعد المدرسة.
translations.nl: De kinderen willen na school iets doen.
translations.uk: Діти хочуть чимось зайнятися після школи.
translations.hu: A gyerekek szeretnének csinálni valamit iskola után.
translations.hi: बच्चे स्कूल के बाद कुछ करना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci chcą coś porobić po szkole.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά θέλουν να κάνουν κάτι μετά το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Barna vil finne på noe etter skolen.
translations.id: Anak-anak ingin melakukan sesuatu sepulang sekolah.
translations.sv: Barnen vill hitta på något efter skolan.
translations.ro: Copiii ar vrea să facă ceva după școală.
translations.cs: Děti by chtěly po škole něco podniknout.
translations.da: Børnene vil gerne lave noget efter skole.
translations.fi: Lapset haluaisivat tehdä jotain koulun jälkeen.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは放課後に何かしたい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking 'Kinder' as nominative plural subject.
Plural noun functioning as the subject.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form used for desire/politeness, 3rd pl); selects the bare infinitive 'unternehmen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces temporal PP 'nach der Schule'.
Definite article in dative feminine singular, modifying 'Schule'.
Noun head of the PP 'nach der Schule'; dative case as governed by 'nach'.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object of 'unternehmen'.
Bare infinitive main verb selected by 'möchten'; inseparable-prefix verb.
